markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Check-in on sprint progress and align on strategic expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Gap:** Bubble needs proactive strategic leadership, not just content ops. GrowthX must shift from reactive fulfillment to leading with recommendations to justify the partnership's value.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [**SoW Reset:** The team must reset to the Statement of Work (SoW), which was deprioritized for urgent product changes. All Phase 1 deliverables must be completed before Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**Competitive Brief:** A key deliverable, the competitive brief, is 75% complete and will be shared by early next week. It will analyze Bubble's standing in both the no-code and AI app dev markets.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [**Channel Strategy:** GrowthX must provide guidance for other surfaces (marketing site, forum, manual) to enable a 360-degree SEO strategy and maximize content impact.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Expectations vs. Delivery

  - [Bubble's core need is proactive strategic leadership, not just content production.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [The partnership's value is currently unclear, as Bubble has had to pull for strategic insights (e.g., "turn this PDF into a report with insights," "tell us which queries to track").](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [GrowthX acknowledged this gap, attributing it to over-indexing on operational setup and real-time product changes.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** GrowthX will adopt a "bottom line up front" approach, leading with recommendations and their rationale before discussing content updates.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)

### SoW Alignment & Deliverables

  - [The SoW was deprioritized due to urgent product changes and a new competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will reset to the SoW, ensuring all Phase 1 deliverables are completed before transitioning to Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**Competitive Brief:** This key deliverable is 75% complete.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Awaiting SERP to AI migration data.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [**ETA:** End of day Friday or early Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [**Analysis:** Compares Bubble's standing in the no-code vs. AI app dev cohorts.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

### Guidance for Other Channels

  - [Bubble needs strategic guidance for other surfaces to enable a 360-degree SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [**Forum:** Gets crawled well but creates "noise" in metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
      - [**Question:** Should it be treated like Reddit (prioritized by LLMs) or a blog?](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [**Manual (Docs):** The primary source for LLMs providing product guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Question:** How can it be optimized for this use case?](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [Deliver the competitive brief by end of day Friday or early Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [Adopt a "bottom line up front" approach for all future recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [Prioritize completing all Phase 1 SoW deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [Develop strategic guidance for the marketing site, forum, and manual.](https://fathom.video/share/4-yKVM1ydHptYUzSByuHeLkprJ82nx5V?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
